titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Marriage

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ اَلْبَاقِرِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَا يَمْنَعُ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ أَنْ يَتَّخِذَ أَهْلاً لَعَلَّ اَللَّهُ أَنْ يَرْزُقَهُ نَسَمَةً تُثْقِلُ اَلْأَرْضَ بِلاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اَللَّهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4340 - It is narrated from Amr ibn Shimr, from Jabir, from Abu Ja'far Muhammad ibn Ali al-Baqir (as) that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"What prevents a believer from taking a spouse? Perhaps Allah (swt) will grant him offspring who will fill the earth with 'There is no god but Allah (swt).'"

text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ: "ثَلاَثٌ مِنْ سُنَنِ اَلْمُرْسَلِينَ اَلْعِطْرُ وَ إِحْفَاءُ اَلشَّعْرِ وَ كَثْرَةُ اَلطَّرُوقَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4341 - It is narrated from Mu'ammar ibn Khallad that Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) said: "Three practices are from the traditions of the messengers, using perfume, removing excess hair, and frequently visiting one's wife (or wives)."

parts.text: قَدْ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ

text:
قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ تَزَوَّجَ أَحْرَزَ نِصْفَ دِينِهِ".
وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : "فَلْيَتَّقِ اَللَّهَ فِي اَلنِّصْفِ اَلْبَاقِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4342 - It is narrated from al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Abi Hamzah, from Abu Abdillah (as), that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever gets married has safeguarded half of his religion."
In another narration, it is added: "So let him fear Allah (swt) regarding the remaining half."

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَا بُنِيَ بِنَاءٌ فِي اَلْإِسْلاَمِ أَحَبُّ إِلَى اَللَّهِ تَعَالَى مِنَ اَلتَّزْوِيجِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4343 - Abdullah ibn al-Hakam narrated from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"No structure in Islam is more beloved to Allah (swt), the Exalted, than marriage."

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ

text: إِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "تَزَوَّجُوا فَإِنِّي مُكَاثِرٌ بِكُمُ اَلْأُمَمَ غَداً فِي اَلْقِيَامَةِ حَتَّى إِنَّ اَلسِّقْطَ لَيَجِيءُ مُحْبَنْطِئاً عَلَى بَابِ اَلْجَنَّةِ فَيُقَالُ لَهُ اُدْخُلِ اَلْجَنَّةَ فَيَقُولُ لاَ حَتَّى يَدْخُلَ أَبَوَايَ اَلْجَنَّةَ قَبْلِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4344 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim that Abu Abdillah (as) said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Marry, for I will take pride in your numbers before the nations on the Day of Judgment. Even the miscarried child will stand at the gate of Paradise, refusing to enter until his parents enter Paradise before him."

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "اِتَّخَذُوا اَلْأَهْلَ فَإِنَّهُ أَرْزَقُ لَكُمْ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4345 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Take a spouse, for it is a means of increasing your sustenance."
